overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a gritty, run-down urban street in Night City. The scene features a mix of dilapidated low-rise buildings and futuristic skyscrapers under an overcast sky, with scattered pedestrians, abandoned military vehicles, and debris lining the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between metal warehouse buildings

events.description: approaching the end of the alley, street and military vehicles become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the overgrown dirt alley toward the open street ahead

entered.detail: corrugated metal industrial building with green window trim
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying red and blue graphics
crisscrossing electrical wires suspended between wooden utility poles
abandoned dark green military vehicles blocking the street intersection

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a narrow alley between industrial buildings, moving forward through overgrown weeds and dirt. A large digital billboard glows on the right wall, while abandoned military trucks are visible at the alley's end. Power lines crisscross overhead against the cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with abandoned military vehicles

events.description: exiting the narrow alley onto the open street
turning right onto the sidewalk and continuing forward

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the sidewalk and walking past the abandoned military trucks

notable_agents.action: person standing on the balcony of the building observing the street
abandoned military truck with open doors parked on the street

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster with yellow lid and graffiti
wet asphalt street with red painted curbs and scattered debris
tall palm tree with dry fronds on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens onto a gritty urban street with abandoned military trucks. The camera turns right onto a concrete sidewalk, passing a green dumpster and palm trees. The sky is fully visible overhead, and a few pedestrians are scattered in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: run-down commercial sidewalk with scattered trash and debris

events.description: pink sports car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk
person with red hair and prosthetic leg walking toward the camera

entered.detail: piles of blue and black garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk
red couch and discarded furniture on the dirt beside the sidewalk
massive modern glass and steel tower with construction scaffolding dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: Walking along the run-down sidewalk, the camera passes piles of trash bags and abandoned furniture. Pedestrians walk in both directions, including a person with a distinctive red prosthetic leg. A futuristic skyscraper looms in the distance, contrasting with the dilapidated low-rise buildings. A pink car drives past on the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk area with large industrial dumpster

events.description: slowing down and approaching the green dumpster
looking inside the dumpster at the trash bags within

agents.ego_description: approaching and inspecting the contents of the green dumpster

entered.detail: green industrial dumpster with open metal lid revealing white trash bags inside

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a large green dumpster on the right side of the sidewalk. The player looks down into the open dumpster, revealing white trash bags inside. The futuristic skyscraper shifts to the left of the frame as the camera focuses on the dumpster inspection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with oncoming pedestrians and traffic

events.description: turning around to walk back in the opposite direction
green military truck and silver sedan driving down the street

agents.ego_description: walking back along the sidewalk in the opposite direction, observing passing vehicles and oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: muscular person in white tank top and blue pants walking toward the camera
green military truck driving down the street followed by a sedan

entered.detail: red and white vending machine on the sidewalk
palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Turning around, the camera walks back along the sidewalk, now facing oncoming pedestrians including a muscular person in a white tank top. A green military truck and other vehicles drive past on the street. A red vending machine and palm trees are visible on the left side as the camera moves away from the dumpster area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway out into a sprawling, gritty urban street. It begins by moving through overgrown weeds and dirt beneath crisscrossing power lines, passing a glowing digital billboard before emerging from the alley toward abandoned military trucks. As the camera turns onto a concrete sidewalk, the environment opens up to reveal a contrast between dilapidated low-rise buildings and a looming futuristic skyscraper, with the camera passing piles of trash and pedestrians, including a person with a red prosthetic leg. The scene then shifts focus as the camera pauses to look down into a large green dumpster filled with white trash bags, causing the distant skyscraper to slide to the left of the frame. Finally, the camera turns around to walk back along the sidewalk, passing a red vending machine and palm trees while facing oncoming pedestrians and passing military vehicles.
